overrides.expect: \delta (x - a) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0, & \quad \text {if x\neq a} \\ \infty , & \quad \text {if x = a} \end{array} \right\} \text {with} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {\infty} \delta (x - a) d x = 1.
overrides.new: \delta (x - a) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0, & \quad \text {if } x \neq a\\ \infty , & \quad \text {if } x = a \end{array} \right\} \text {with} \int_ {- \infty} ^ {\infty} \delta (x - a) d x = 1.
